fit_data_manifest.basis_evaluation_coordinates: unclipped local algebraic coordinates; ProductBasis applies AlgebraicMapping(1) internally
fit_data_manifest.target_transform: reference density square-root includes sum log|dx/dz|

nonclaims: Phase 6Y order-3 degree candidate does not by itself close degree convergence
degree convergence interpretation requires a reviewed convergence ledger
non-default Lagrangep bases are extension_or_invention comparators, not source-faithful author defaults
validation holdout may select or veto degree candidates only inside a later reviewed protocol
audit cloud remains reserved and not used for tuning
Phase 7 remains blocked until degree convergence is reviewed or owner-reframed
ALS training is historical and stale for fixed-variant Zhao-Cui
training-base optimizer wiring is fixed_hmc_adaptation/extension mechanics, not a source-faithful author TT-cross proof
no author SIR fit quality claim
no d50 or d100 scale claim

optimizer_budget.training_convergence_policy: scheduler_stop_required_for_degree_candidate_selection; validation selection is not degree convergence evidence
optimizer_budget.training_data_reuse_policy: fixed training cloud cycled by deterministic contiguous optimizer batches

nonclaims: not rank or degree promotion evidence
smoke loss is not pilot evidence

zhao_cui_regularization_default_policy.owner_directive: L1 regularization with L1 weight tuning is the default Zhao-Cui training-base procedure going forward.
